prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model, which assumes log-returns are normally distributed. We used the current price of $214.95, a time horizon of 20 trading days (approximately 0.079 years), an estimated annualized volatility (sigma) of 22% (0.22), and an annualized expected return (mu) of 8% (0.08). The point estimate represents the median of the log-normal distribution. The confidence intervals are derived from this distribution using standard Z-scores for the respective confidence levels. This is a statistical prediction based on historical patterns and theoretical assumptions; actual prices may vary significantly due to market events or changes in underlying fundamentals.
